name: Glow
description: A soft coloured shadow that hugs the surface's edge, brightest against the window and fading out over the glow size. It follows the frame's rounded corners and dims when the surface loses focus.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Glow strength
parameters.description: Intensity of the halo at the window edge

parameters.name: Glow size
parameters.description: How far the halo reaches from the edge (px)

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Corner rounding the halo follows (px, match the Border pack)
